matchedText: Course closed for this cycle: Energy Technologies is no longer accepting applications for this cycle. It is expected to re-open for new applications in early September.
matchedTextAfter: The world faces major challenges in meeting the current and future demand for sustainable and secure energy supply and use. The one-year Energy Technologies MPhil programme is designed for graduates who want to help tackle these problems by developing practical engineering solutions, and who want to learn more about the fundamental science and the technologies involved in energy utilisation, electricity generation, energy efficiency, and alternative energy.
